tool_calls.name: execute_lisp
tool_calls.input: {"code":"(def in-progress-issues (filter (fn [i] (= (:state i) \"in_progress\")) (linear_issues)))(def login-to-count (group-by :id in-progress-issues))(def max-login (first (keys (apply max-key (fn [k] (count (get login-to-count k))) (keys login-to-count)))))(def count (count (get login-to-count max-login)))(println max-login count)"}
